description: Vision Encoder Architecture Schema for Multimodal Models

hidden_size.description: Hidden size / embedding dimension of the vision encoder

patch_size.description: Spatial patch size in pixels (e.g., 14 means 14x14 patches)

image_size.description: Default input image resolution in pixels

num_layers.description: Number of transformer layers in the vision encoder

num_attention_heads.description: Number of attention heads in the vision encoder

intermediate_size.description: FFN intermediate size in the vision encoder

in_channels.description: Number of input image channels (3 for RGB)

activation.description: Activation function used in the vision encoder (e.g., quick_gelu, gelu, silu)

type.description: Normalization type in the vision encoder

projector.description: Multimodal projector that maps vision embeddings to language model space

num_layers.description: Number of layers in the projector (for MLP or cross-attention projectors)

activation.description: Activation function in the projector (e.g., gelu)

special_tokens.description: Special token IDs for image/video in the tokenizer

image_token_id.description: Token ID used as a placeholder for image input

vision_start_token_id.description: Token ID marking the start of a vision region

vision_end_token_id.description: Token ID marking the end of a vision region

vision_token_id.description: Token ID for a generic vision placeholder (e.g., used by Qwen2-VL)

video_token_id.description: Token ID for video frame placeholder

dynamic_resolution.description: Dynamic image resolution support (e.g., Qwen2-VL native dynamic resolution)

spatial_merge_size.description: Spatial merging stride for reducing token count

temporal_patch_size.description: Temporal patch size for video understanding (number of frames per patch)

fusion_type.description: How vision and language modalities are fused

position_embedding.description: Position embedding configuration for the vision encoder

mrope_sections.description: Per-modality RoPE dimension sections (for mrope type)
